description: Announce location of objects via tones
changelog:
* NVDA 2026.1 compatibility
* New feature: Automatically play an outline of a newly activated foreground object (activate in settings)
* MIDI options in settings panel are disabled unless MIDI itself is enabled
* Bug fixes regarding changes in Python 3.13 and upgrades in wxPython
* Some code microoptimizations for better performance
* MIDI events are not managed by main thread any longer
* Add-on's configuration is now saved using atomic techniques and is very unlikely to be corrupted by mid-save power loss or filesystem mishaps
